attributes.action: King Charles to desolve parliament and call a general election
attributes.additional_details: Because the general public are not happy with the prime minister and hi in truthful ways it’s time for change!!
attributes.background: Call for the king to dissolve parliament due to no confidence and have a general election

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
